name: Bird Perch
tagline: Bird vocal ID — Kaggle TF classifier + k-NN ranks
description: Lightweight static audio UI and FastAPI backend. Loads google/bird-vocalization-classifier (TensorFlow 2) from Kaggle Models, runs nearest-species ranking from logits. Requires Kaggle credentials for first-time model download unless BIRDPERCH_MODEL_PATH points to an extracted model directory. Classifier labels are often eBird-style species codes — set BIRDPERCH_EBIRD_TAXONOMY_CSV (or mount data/ebird_taxonomy.csv) so /api/identify returns common + scientific names in species, with species_code for the raw label. Continuous listening (/ws/listen) accepts browser MediaRecorder WebM fragments: the server accumulates bytes, decodes the growing file, appends new PCM into a rolling buffer, and periodically re-infers (see BIRDPERCH_STREAM_* env vars).

env_vars.description: Optional. Local path to an extracted Kaggle TF SavedModel (skips kagglehub download).
Set to 1 for development without TensorFlow model (returns mock species).
Optional. eBird/Clements taxonomy CSV with SPECIES_CODE + COMMON_NAME (and optional SCIENTIFIC_NAME) columns so API species field is human-readable; raw code is returned as species_code.
Optional. Download URL for an eBird/Clements taxonomy CSV (used at startup if the CSV file is missing). Defaults to Cornell Clements eBird taxonomy CSV.
Optional. Minimum seconds between live /ws/listen classifier runs (default 1.5). Lower = snappier UI, higher CPU.
Optional. Rolling PCM buffer length in seconds for live listen (default 22).
Optional. Max WebM chunk size per WebSocket binary frame for live listen (default 524288).
Optional. Max accumulated raw WebM bytes per live /ws/listen session (default 15728640). MediaRecorder sends headerless fragments; the server grows this buffer until decode succeeds.
Optional. Minimum confidence to show a single 'Current best match' during continuous listening (default 0.20). Below this, the UI shows 'No confident match' while still listing top-5.
Optional. Set to 1 to run YAMNet background-sound labels and return them in the API/UI. Default 0 (off) to save CPU.
Optional. Top-K YAMNet labels to return (default 8 for uploads, 5 for live listen).
Kaggle API username (with KAGGLE_KEY) for kagglehub model download on first request.
Kaggle API key for model download.
